name: Best Resources to Learn Python
description: A curated collection of the best tutorials, documentation, videos, and repositories to learn Python from beginner to advanced.
author: trelk-team

items.title: The Official Python Tutorial
items.summary: The official Python documentation tutorial. Covers all the basics from data structures to modules, I/O, and error handling. The definitive starting point for any Python learner.

items.title: Learn Python — Full Course for Beginners (freeCodeCamp)
items.summary: A 4.5-hour comprehensive Python course by freeCodeCamp covering variables, data types, functions, loops, classes, and building projects. Over 40 million views.

items.title: Automate the Boring Stuff with Python
items.summary: A practical programming book for total beginners. Teaches Python by building real automation projects: web scraping, spreadsheets, email, PDF manipulation, and more.

items.title: The Algorithms — Python
items.summary: A GitHub repository with implementations of all major algorithms and data structures in Python. Over 180k stars. Excellent reference for learning algorithms through readable Python code.

items.title: 11 Beginner Tips for Learning Python
items.summary: Practical advice for Python beginners: how to set up your environment, avoid common mistakes, use the REPL effectively, and build a learning habit that sticks.

items.title: Intermediate Python Programming (freeCodeCamp)
items.summary: 6-hour intermediate Python course covering list comprehensions, generators, decorators, threading, multiprocessing, function arguments, and OOP patterns.

items.title: What the f*ck Python!
items.summary: A collection of surprising and tricky Python snippets that reveal the language's hidden behaviors. Great for deepening your understanding of how Python actually works under the hood.

items.title: asyncio — Asynchronous I/O in Python
items.summary: Official documentation for Python's asyncio library. Covers coroutines, tasks, event loops, streams, and synchronization primitives for concurrent programming.

items.title: Python Type Checking Guide
items.summary: Comprehensive guide to Python's type hints system: annotations, mypy, typing module, generics, protocols, and how to gradually add types to existing codebases.

items.title: Awesome Python
items.summary: A curated list of awesome Python frameworks, libraries, and resources. Over 220k stars on GitHub. The go-to directory for discovering Python tools for any domain.

items.title: Python for Data Science — Full Course (freeCodeCamp)
items.summary: 12-hour course covering NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, and Scikit-learn. Hands-on projects with real datasets. Perfect for learning Python's data science ecosystem.

items.title: FastAPI Tutorial — Official Documentation
items.summary: Step-by-step tutorial for building modern APIs with FastAPI. Covers path parameters, request bodies, validation, authentication, databases, and deployment.

items.title: Python 100 Days — From Novice to Professional
items.summary: A structured 100-day learning path for Python. Covers basics, OOP, databases, web development, data analysis, machine learning, and DevOps. Over 150k GitHub stars.

items.title: Effective Python Testing with Pytest
items.summary: Learn to write robust tests in Python using pytest. Covers fixtures, parametrize, mocking, test organization, and CI integration for professional Python development.

items.title: Caleb Curry — Python Full Course for Beginners
items.summary: A beginner-friendly 12-hour Python course with clear explanations, practical examples, and exercises. Covers everything from installation to object-oriented programming.

items.title: Python Design Patterns
items.summary: A collection of design patterns and idioms implemented in Python. Covers creational, structural, behavioral, and Python-specific patterns with clear examples.

items.title: Intermediate Python (book)
items.summary: Free online book covering intermediate Python topics: generators, decorators, context managers, collections, coroutines, and Pythonic idioms that separate beginners from professionals.

items.title: Python Virtual Environments: A Primer
items.summary: Everything you need to know about Python virtual environments: venv, virtualenv, conda, Poetry, and why isolating dependencies is essential for every Python project.

items.title: Object-Oriented Programming with Python (freeCodeCamp)
items.summary: A focused 2-hour course on OOP in Python. Covers classes, inheritance, polymorphism, encapsulation, and SOLID principles with practical game-building examples.

items.title: System Design Primer (with Python examples)
items.summary: Learn how to design large-scale systems with Python examples. Covers scalability, caching, load balancing, databases, and microservices. Over 270k GitHub stars.
